name: Butterscotch Apple Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice and apples; toss until well coated.
3. Stir in sugar, flour, cinnamon, and salt; mix well.
4. Turn into 9-inch unbaked pie shell. Cover edges with aluminum foil.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 20 minutes.
6. For topping: Melt Nestle Butterscotch Flavored Morsels and butter over hot water, stirring until smooth. Remove from heat; stir in flour and salt. Blend until mixture forms large crumbs.
7. Remove foil from pie. Crumb mixture over top of hot apples.
8. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 25 minutes longer.
